step_rationale: Endothelial receptor tyrosine phosphatase; regulates PECAM-1 signaling in vascular integrity.
mechanism: CD148 is a vascular receptor phosphatase that regulates endothelial adhesion and barrier function, modulating plaque erosion.

references.title: Relieving platelet inhibition using a novel bispecific antibody: a novel approach for circumventing the platelet storage lesion.
references.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH
